data.title: Fraudbeat.com re-launches as top news source for fraud trends and prevention, offering in-depth reporting and analysis.
data.description: In Sheridan, Wyoming, on January 21, 2026, Fraudbeat.com, a news website focusing on fraud trends and scams, has unveiled its updated platform. The restructured site offers enhanced reporting, in-depth analysis, and other improvements to better serve businesses and consumers.

data.title: Iridium NTN Direct beta trials ongoing, first message sent. Iridium (IRDM) leading global satellite provider.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Iridium Communications Inc. (Nasdaq: IRDM) based in McLean, Virginia, revealed that the inaugural message sent via the Iridium NTN Direct service from a mobile device featured the phrase "To Iridium and Beyond." The company specializes in offering global satellite services for voice, data, and PNT. This development marks a significant milestone for Iridium as it showcases the capabilities of their service.

data.title: Southwest Florida commercial real estate market transitions from aggressive growth to realism in 2026.
data.description: In Fort Myers, Florida as of January 21, 2026, commercial real estate investors in Southwest Florida are transitioning to a new approach after a period of robust expansion and risky underwriting. The focus is shifting from speculation to a more cautious outlook as the market dynamics evolve.

data.title: Heather Ripley to speak at AHR EXPO 2026 about boosting awareness. Global PR agency Ripley PR specializes in skilled trades.
data.description: A renowned public relations specialist in the skilled trades sector will be conducting a seminar on effective strategies to enhance recognition and presence in the industry. This event is scheduled to take place in Knoxville, Tennessee on January 21, 2026. Ripley PR, a prominent global PR firm focusing on skilled trades and B2B technology, will be spearheading this session aimed at sharing insights and best practices for increasing visibility.

data.title: Wayfair to announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026, post market opening. Inc (NYSE:W) updates investors.
data.description: Boston-based Wayfair Inc. (NYSE:W) revealed plans to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter ending on December 31, 2025, ahead of the market opening on February 19, 2026. The company, known for being a one-stop-shop for all home-related products, will conduct a conference call following the release to discuss the results.

data.title: Biotech expert Teresa Foy joins T1D Fund to advance Type 1 Diabetes therapies, enhancing impact strategy with innovative investments.
data.description: A former executive at Bristol Myers Squibb and Celgene is set to enhance the impact strategy of The T1D Fund, a venture capital fund dedicated to Type 1 Diabetes research. The individual will help drive transformative investments in innovative approaches. This announcement was made in Boston on January 21, 2026. The T1D Fund aims to make significant investments in breakthrough therapies for Type 1 Diabetes.
